ARED.message:
1. Seat layout shown for PVR INOX cinemas is representational only; the actual auditorium layout may vary.
2. A valid ticket is mandatory for children aged 3+ (5+ in Uttarakhand).
3. Patrons below 18 years cannot watch films certified A (Adults Only).
4. Baggage counter facilities are not available; avoid carrying large or restricted items.
5. For 3D movies, ticket price includes 3D glasses usage charges.
6. Outside food & beverages are prohibited, including food ordered via delivery apps/platforms, even if it contains PVR INOX F&B items delivered to the premises.
7. Prohibited items include laptops, tablets, cameras, knives, firearms, and inflammable or hazardous objects.
8. Carry bags, outside eatables, helmets, and large handbags are not allowed inside auditoriums.
9. Patrons under the influence of alcohol or drugs will not be permitted entry.
10. Tickets once purchased cannot be cancelled, exchanged, transferred, or adjusted for another show.
11. PVR INOX may contact guests for feedback or service improvement.
12. Management reserves the right of admission; all decisions by PVR INOX management are final and binding.
13. Pre-booked F&B must be collected from the designated counter.
14. Recording or transmitting any part of the film via mobile or camera is strictly prohibited and punishable by law.
15. Smoking is prohibited; cigarettes, lighters, matchsticks, gutkha, and pan masala are not allowed.
16. Ticket prices are subject to change without prior notice.
17. For birthdays, private screenings, or special occasions, contact the cinema manager.
18. Infants below 4 years or children under 3.6 feet are not permitted in 4DX auditoriums due to safety regulations.
By proceeding, you agree that bookings on this platform are subject to applicable PVR INOX Terms & Conditions.
